source_text: Cell Cycle HCT8 (ECAC90032006) line was cultivated in RPMI 1640 (Gibco, New York, NY, USA) supplemented with 10% heat-inactivated bovine serum and penicillin/streptomycin at 37 °C with 5% CO . The mice organs were collected under general anesthesia. Biological material was fixed, directly after the sampling, in 10% buffered neutral formalin, for 72 h, at room temperature, and then processed for routinely histological paraffin embedding technique.
